name: Apricot Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8x4x2 inch pan with cooking spray.
3. In a large mixing bowl combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a medium-sized bowl, beat egg, sugar, apple sauce, carrots, and vegetable oil together.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture in one addition; stir until just moistened (batter will be thick).
6. Fold in chopped dried apricots.
7. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan.
8. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool. Wrap loaf and store overnight before slicing.
POWDERED SUGAR ICING: In a small bowl combine 1/2 cup sifted powdered sugar and 2 teaspoons apple juice to make drizzling consistency.
